# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI with Dependency & Build Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [ "**" ]
  pull_request:

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  NODE_VERSION: "20"
  PYTHON_VERSION: "3.11"

jobs:
  build-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        env: [ dev, staging, prod ]

    env:
      APP_ENV: ${{ matrix.env }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Detect dependency/config files (optional)
        id: detect
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "has_npm=$([[ -f package-lock.json || -f npm-shrinkwrap.json ]] && echo true || echo false)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "has_yarn=$([[ -f yarn.lock ]] && echo true || echo false)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "has_pnpm=$([[ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]] && echo true || echo false)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "has_pip=$([[ -f requirements.txt || -f requirements-dev.txt || -f pyproject.toml || -f poetry.lock || -f Pipfile.lock ]] && echo true || echo false)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Cache Node modules
        if: steps.detect.outputs.has_npm == 'true' || steps.detect.outputs.has_yarn == 'true' || steps.detect.outputs.has_pnpm == 'true'
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            **/node_modules
          key: >-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node_modules-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ matrix.env }}-
            ${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/npm-shrinkwrap.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml', '**/package.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node_modules-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ matrix.env }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node_modules-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node_modules-

      - name: Cache pip downloads (pip cache)
        if: steps.detect.outputs.has_pip == 'true'
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
          key: >-
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ matrix.env }}-
            ${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/pyproject.toml', '**/poetry.lock', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/setup.cfg', '**/setup.py') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ matrix.env }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-

      - name: Cache build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            .next/cache
            .turbo
            .parcel-cache
            .cache
            coverage
            **/.pytest_cache
            **/.mypy_cache
          key: >-
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ matrix.env }}-${{ github.ref_name }}-
            ${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/npm-shrinkwrap.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml', '**/package.json', '**/requirements*.txt', '**/pyproject.toml', '**/poetry.lock', '**/*.ts', '**/*.tsx', '**/*.js', '**/*.jsx', '**/*.py') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ matrix.env }}-${{ github.ref_name }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ matrix.env }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-

      - name: Cache configuration (including environment-specific)
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .env
            .env.*
            config/**
            configs/**
            .npmrc
            .yarnrc
            .yarnrc.yml
            .pnpmfile.cjs
            .pnpmfile.js
            pnpm-workspace.yaml
            .python-version
            pip.conf
            pyproject.toml
            poetry.toml
            .tool-versions
            tsconfig*.json
            babel.config.*
            webpack.config.*
            vite.config.*
            jest.config.*
            .eslintrc*
            .prettierrc*
          key: >-
            ${{ runner.os }}-cfg-${{ matrix.env }}-
            ${{ hashFiles('.env', '.env.*', 'config/**', 'configs/**', '.npmrc', '.yarnrc', '.yarnrc.yml', 'pnpm-workspace.yaml', '.python-version', 'pip.conf', 'pyproject.toml', 'poetry.lock', 'poetry.toml', '.tool-versions', 'tsconfig*.json', 'babel.config.*', 'webpack.config.*', 'vite.config.*', 'jest.config.*', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-cfg-${{ matrix.env }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-cfg-

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        if: steps.detect.outputs.has_pnpm == 'true'
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - name: Install Node dependencies (npm)
        if: steps.detect.outputs.has_pnpm != 'true' && steps.detect.outputs.has_yarn != 'true' && (steps.detect.outputs.has_npm == 'true')
        run: npm ci
      - name: Install Node dependencies (yarn)
        if: steps.detect.outputs.has_yarn == 'true' && steps.detect.outputs.has_pnpm != 'true'
        run: yarn install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Install Python dependencies (requirements.txt)
        if: hashFiles('requirements.txt') != ''
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install -r requirements.txt
      - name: Install Python dependencies (requirements-dev.txt)
        if: hashFiles('requirements-dev.txt') != ''
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
      - name: Install Python dependencies (pyproject/poetry)
        if: hashFiles('pyproject.toml') != '' && hashFiles('poetry.lock') != ''
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install poetry
          poetry install --no-interaction --no-ansi

      - name: Build
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            if npm run | grep -qE ' build'; then
              npm run build
            fi
          fi

      - name: Test
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            if npm run | grep -qE ' test'; then
              npm test
            fi
          fi
          if [[ -d tests || -f pytest.ini || -f pyproject.toml ]]; then
            python -m pip install --upgrade pip >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
            python -m pytest -q || true
          fi
